channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: Ministers have described a "national emergency" and the UK government has pledged to halve violence against women and girls within a decade. For information and support, search BBC Action Line. #WomensSafety #Awareness #UK #BBCNews
item.description: Ministers have described a "national emergency" and the UK government has pledged to halve violence against women and girls within a decade. For information and support, search BBC Action Line. #WomensSafety #Awareness #UK #BBCNews

item.title: All six members of a US military refuelling aircraft's crew have been confirmed dead after it crashed in western Iraq, US Central Command has said. #US #Iraq #Military #USMilitary #Plane
item.description: All six members of a US military refuelling aircraft's crew have been confirmed dead after it crashed in western Iraq, US Central Command has said. #US #Iraq #Military #USMilitary #Plane

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei hasn't been seen in public, or in videos or photographs on state media, even though it has now been almost five days since he became Iran’s third supreme leader. This post replaces an earlier version as early reports indicated Mojtaba Kha
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei hasn't been seen in public, or in videos or photographs on state media, even though it has now been almost five days since he became Iran’s third supreme leader. This post replaces an earlier version as early reports indicated Mojtaba Kha

item.title: It’s snowing in spring. 😩 #UKWeather #BritishWeather #Snow #BBCNews
item.description: It’s snowing in spring. 😩 #UKWeather #BritishWeather #Snow #BBCNews

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of Iran's Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in US-Israeli strikes, was chosen as his successor on Sunday. This post replaces an earlier version as early reports indicated Mojtaba Khamenei's mother was also killed in the stri
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of Iran's Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in US-Israeli strikes, was chosen as his successor on Sunday. This post replaces an earlier version as early reports indicated Mojtaba Khamenei's mother was also killed in the stri

item.title: Around a fifth of the world's oil passes through the Strait of Hormuz. #Iran #Oman #Bahrain #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: Around a fifth of the world's oil passes through the Strait of Hormuz. #Iran #Oman #Bahrain #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Queen garden ants are a protected species, but there is a growing demand for them in Europe and Asia on the exotic pets market. #Kenya #Nairobi #Ants #ExoticPets #News #BBCNews
item.description: Queen garden ants are a protected species, but there is a growing demand for them in Europe and Asia on the exotic pets market. #Kenya #Nairobi #Ants #ExoticPets #News #BBCNews

item.title: Talking at the Pentagon, Hegseth also said Iran has no air force, air defence, or navy, and that their missile launchers are being destroyed. #PeteHegseth #Iran #US #SupremeLeader #BBCNews
item.description: Talking at the Pentagon, Hegseth also said Iran has no air force, air defence, or navy, and that their missile launchers are being destroyed. #PeteHegseth #Iran #US #SupremeLeader #BBCNews

item.title: The advice comes after a British man was charged under cyber-crime laws in Dubai for allegedly filming Iranian missiles over the city. #UAE #Dubai #AbuDhabi #BritishEmbassy #BBCNews
item.description: The advice comes after a British man was charged under cyber-crime laws in Dubai for allegedly filming Iranian missiles over the city. #UAE #Dubai #AbuDhabi #BritishEmbassy #BBCNews

item.title: Some researchers are concerned that generative AI output could be confusing for children at a developmental stage where they learning about social interaction. They found that Gabbo was unable to hear interruptions, talked over children, could not differe
item.description: Some researchers are concerned that generative AI output could be confusing for children at a developmental stage where they learning about social interaction. They found that Gabbo was unable to hear interruptions, talked over children, could not differe

item.title: The US has introduced a waiver that will allow countries to buy up Russian oil in a bid to reduce the global economic impact of disruption to oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has been targeting in response to the US and Israel's attacks. #R
item.description: The US has introduced a waiver that will allow countries to buy up Russian oil in a bid to reduce the global economic impact of disruption to oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has been targeting in response to the US and Israel's attacks. #R

item.title: The new profile picture for Iran's supreme leader has been edited with AI, BBC Verify has found. Mojtaba Khamenei made his first public statement on Iranian state TV on Thursday, but the supreme leader didn’t appear in person, and has not been seen in pub
item.description: The new profile picture for Iran's supreme leader has been edited with AI, BBC Verify has found. Mojtaba Khamenei made his first public statement on Iranian state TV on Thursday, but the supreme leader didn’t appear in person, and has not been seen in pub

item.title: The BBC visits Kurdish Peshmerga fighters, who say they're ready to cross the border into Iran and join the war there. #MiddleEast #Iran #Kurdistan #News #BBCNews
item.description: The BBC visits Kurdish Peshmerga fighters, who say they're ready to cross the border into Iran and join the war there. #MiddleEast #Iran #Kurdistan #News #BBCNews

item.title: On Friday, US President Donald Trump claimed Iran’s air force is “no longer”, as a result of military action. #Iran #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: On Friday, US President Donald Trump claimed Iran’s air force is “no longer”, as a result of military action. #Iran #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Have you seen any of these films? #Oscars #Razzies #Movies #BBCNews
item.description: Have you seen any of these films? #Oscars #Razzies #Movies #BBCNews

item.title: The avalanche death toll in the Alps has been higher than usual this year. #Ski #Avalanche #Snow #BBCNews
item.description: The avalanche death toll in the Alps has been higher than usual this year. #Ski #Avalanche #Snow #BBCNews

item.title: The attack took place shortly after two Iran-backed fighters were killed in strikes on Iraq's capital, AFP reported, while widespread strikes continued across the Middle East overnight. #Baghdad #Iraq #Iran #US #BBCNews
item.description: The attack took place shortly after two Iran-backed fighters were killed in strikes on Iraq's capital, AFP reported, while widespread strikes continued across the Middle East overnight. #Baghdad #Iraq #Iran #US #BBCNews

item.title: Gracie is the first actor with a limb difference to appear on Bridgerton, and she says it has become more than just an acting job. #Bridgerton #HazelBridgerton #BridgertonS4 #Netflix #LimbDifference #BBCNews
item.description: Gracie is the first actor with a limb difference to appear on Bridgerton, and she says it has become more than just an acting job. #Bridgerton #HazelBridgerton #BridgertonS4 #Netflix #LimbDifference #BBCNews

item.title: Sasha-Jay's photos were stolen from her social media accounts and used by someone to build relationships with men and friendships with other women. #IdentityTheft #Catfish #Fraud #SocialMedia #FakeAccount #Wales #BBCNews
item.description: Sasha-Jay's photos were stolen from her social media accounts and used by someone to build relationships with men and friendships with other women. #IdentityTheft #Catfish #Fraud #SocialMedia #FakeAccount #Wales #BBCNews

item.title: Since the 2020 boom sparked by The Queen’s Gambit, chess has become a global spectator sport and online hobby. #Chess #OnlineChess #ChessPlayer #ChessStreamer #Streaming #OnlineGaming #BBCNews
item.description: Since the 2020 boom sparked by The Queen’s Gambit, chess has become a global spectator sport and online hobby. #Chess #OnlineChess #ChessPlayer #ChessStreamer #Streaming #OnlineGaming #BBCNews

item.title: Love Island host Maya Jama says she’s "ready to do something else after presenting for so long”. She is set to star in the second season of Guy Ritchie's Netflix series The Gentlemen alongside Theo James. #MayaJama #LoveIsland #Presenter #Acting #BBCNews
item.description: Love Island host Maya Jama says she’s "ready to do something else after presenting for so long”. She is set to star in the second season of Guy Ritchie's Netflix series The Gentlemen alongside Theo James. #MayaJama #LoveIsland #Presenter #Acting #BBCNews

item.title: Are these women the future of F1? #Formula1 #F1 #BBCNews
item.description: Are these women the future of F1? #Formula1 #F1 #BBCNews

item.title: The strike, if a US role was to be confirmed, would amount to one of its worst single cases of civilian casualties in decades of US conflicts in the Middle East. #Iran #MiddleEast #US #BBCNews
item.description: The strike, if a US role was to be confirmed, would amount to one of its worst single cases of civilian casualties in decades of US conflicts in the Middle East. #Iran #MiddleEast #US #BBCNews

item.title: The port of Fujairah sits in a significant location on the Gulf of Oman around 70 miles from the Strait of Hormuz. #Iran #UAE #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: The port of Fujairah sits in a significant location on the Gulf of Oman around 70 miles from the Strait of Hormuz. #Iran #UAE #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Most of the more than two million people living in Gaza are displaced, living in tents or buildings heavily damaged by the war with Israel. Sandstorms present particular health risks to those with respiratory and cardiovascular diseases. #Sandstorm #Gaza
item.description: Most of the more than two million people living in Gaza are displaced, living in tents or buildings heavily damaged by the war with Israel. Sandstorms present particular health risks to those with respiratory and cardiovascular diseases. #Sandstorm #Gaza

item.title: 11-year-old Millie's glasses change colour to make reading more comfortable for people with dyslexia. #Dyslexia #Glasses #Invention #Disability #BBCNews
item.description: 11-year-old Millie's glasses change colour to make reading more comfortable for people with dyslexia. #Dyslexia #Glasses #Invention #Disability #BBCNews

item.title: Who are you rooting for at tonight’s 98th Academy Awards? #Oscars #AcademyAwards #AwardsSeason #FilmTok #BBCNews
item.description: Who are you rooting for at tonight’s 98th Academy Awards? #Oscars #AcademyAwards #AwardsSeason #FilmTok #BBCNews

item.title: "You feel like a parent, but the world might not see you as a parent because your child's not here," Maddie said. #BabyLoss #BabyLossAwareness #BBCNews
item.description: "You feel like a parent, but the world might not see you as a parent because your child's not here," Maddie said. #BabyLoss #BabyLossAwareness #BBCNews

item.title: Israel launched "wide-scale" strikes on targets in Iran, the Israeli military said. #Iran #Tehran #MiddleEast #Israel #BBCNews
item.description: Israel launched "wide-scale" strikes on targets in Iran, the Israeli military said. #Iran #Tehran #MiddleEast #Israel #BBCNews

item.title: Rebecca Lucy Taylor – aka celebrated pop singer Self Esteem - was propelled into popularity after the release of her second album Prioritise Pleasure. #SelfEsteem #BBCNews
item.description: Rebecca Lucy Taylor – aka celebrated pop singer Self Esteem - was propelled into popularity after the release of her second album Prioritise Pleasure. #SelfEsteem #BBCNews
